description_long: This skateboard features a standard popsicle-shaped deck with a black grippy surface on top, likely made from grip tape, and a natural wood finish visible along the sides. The deck is supported by two metal trucks, each mounted with a pair of small, hard wheels that are light in color, possibly white or off-white. The wheels are classic street style, suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks and skate parks. The underside of the deck appears plain, with no visible graphics or branding, and the grip tape covers the entire top surface without any cut-outs or patterns. The trucks are standard in design, with no visible branding or unique features, and are mounted in the typical configuration for street skateboards. Overall, the skateboard is designed for durability and performance in urban settings, with a focus on functionality over decorative elements.
description: A classic street skateboard with a black grip tape top, natural wood sides, white wheels, and standard metal trucks. The deck is plain with no visible graphics or branding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the skateboard, black grip tape on top, natural wood sides, and both pairs of white wheels.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the rounded nose of the deck, black grip tape, and both front wheels partially visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the skateboard's length, grip tape, and wheels.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the rounded tail of the deck, black grip tape, and both rear wheels partially visible.
attribute_wheel_type: street, white, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard, silver metal, no visible branding, standard kingpin mounting
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black, no pattern, no graphics or text
